title_header: The God of High School - The Match With Gods Chapter 1, Episode 9

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Three days after Mira's Sword incident, the G.O.H. finals began in the COEX basement. The finalists came to fight in the tournament, while those previously eliminated gathered in the arena to watch.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: EH?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: MIRA YOO MOON LIGHT SWORD STYLE POWER: LV. 9. DAECHEOL HAN MUAY THAI POWER: LV. 6. DAEWI HAN KYOKUSHIN POWER: LV. 9. JEONJIN WOO SUNMUDO POWER: LV. 8.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WAS HIS STRATEGY TO LIE ABOUT HIS TYPE OF MARTIAL ARTS? THAT'S TAEKWONDO? NO WAY!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Mori attracted people's attention by knocking down his opponents only using his left hand.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: FINAL TOP 32. Group A. Group B. Pepsi. Delta. Hoy.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: THAT DUDE...

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: USING TAEKWONDO WITH 4 FISTS, THEN HE MUST ALSO... WHO'S GOING TO FIGHT WITH...?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: OH? HE'S UP NEXT!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: GAMDO GO LV. 9. MANSEOK GANG LV. 12.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I'LL FIGHT HIM AT THE SEMIFINALS.

dialogue.speaker: GAMDO GO
dialogue.line: SIR JIN!

dialogue.speaker: GAMDO GO
dialogue.line: SIR JIN! A FEW DAYS AGO, I WAS ABLE TO OVERCOME A DIFFICULT SITUATION THANKS TO YOUR HELP. I'D LIKE TO TAKE THIS OPPORTUNITY TO PROPERLY EXPRESS MY GRATITUDE! HOORAY! HOORAY! HOORAY!

dialogue.speaker: JIN
dialogue.line: N-NO, I DIDN'T REALLY DO IT TO HELP YOU...

dialogue.speaker: JIN
dialogue.line: HE'S A PAT FREAK!

dialogue.speaker: GAMDO GO
dialogue.line: YOU MAY DO AWAY WITH YOUR HUMILITY FOR A MOMENT, SIR JIN.

dialogue.speaker: GAMDO GO
dialogue.line: I REALIZED A LOT OF THINGS THAT DAY. I WAS UNABLE TO TRULY GAUGE MY OPPONENT BECAUSE I WAS JUDGING OTHERS' LEVELS BASED ON THEIR OUTER APPEARANCE. I WAS EASILY INTIMIDATED BY MY OPPONENT, PUTTING MYSELF DOWN BEFORE EVEN FIGHTING. FROM YOUR EXAMPLE, I HAVE NOW LEARNED HOW A TRUE MARTIAL ARTS FIGHTER SHOULD ACT.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THE MATCH BETWEEN GROUP B'S GAMDO GO AND MANSEOK GANG WILL NOW BEGIN.

dialogue.speaker: GAMDO GO
dialogue.line: I'LL HEAD OVER TO MY MATCH NOW.

dialogue.speaker: JIN
dialogue.line: GAMDO GO. BE CAREFUL; HE'S STRONG.

dialogue.speaker: MANSEOK GANG
dialogue.line: I'M NOT AFRAID OF BEING DEFEATED, I'M JUST WORRIED THAT MY COURAGE MAY BE SHAKEN BY AN OPPONENT I CAN'T RESPECT. THAT'S WHAT I'M REALLY AFRAID OF.

dialogue.speaker: MANSEOK GANG
dialogue.line: NOW IF YOU'LL EXCUSE ME.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HE'S A LOT TO HANDLE.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: TODAY'S BIG MATCH. GROUP B TOP 32. GAMDO GO TAI CHI CH'LAN POWER: LV. 9. MANSEOK GANG TAEKWONDO POWER: LV. 12.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THE MATCH WILL CONTINUE UNTIL ONE OF THEM LOSES CONSCIOUSNESS OR ADMITS DEFEAT. AS YOU KNOW, THANKS TO NANO-TECHNOLOGY, YOUR LIFE WON'T BE IN DANGER, SO FIGHT TO YOUR HEART'S CONTENT.

dialogue.speaker: GAMDO GO
dialogue.line: SIR GANG, YOU'RE STRONG BUT YOUR STRENGTH HAS GONE OFF THE PATH OF CHIVALRY.

dialogue.speaker: MANSEOK GANG
dialogue.line: WHAT THE HECK ARE YOU SAYING?

dialogue.speaker: GAMDO GO
dialogue.line: I'M WARNING YOU; YOU'D BETTER TAKE OFF YOUR STRAITJACKET.

dialogue.speaker: MANSEOK GANG
dialogue.line: KUK! YOU'RE OUT OF YOUR MIND.

dialogue.speaker: ANNOUNCER
dialogue.line: FIGHTERS IN YOUR PLACES!

dialogue.speaker: MANSEOK GANG
dialogue.line: HUH?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: TAI CHI CH'LAN RABBIT'S STEP & DRAGON STAFF STRIKE.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: TAI CHI CH'LAN DRAGON HORN'S HEAVY WEIGHT.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: TAI CHI CH'LAN RAPID FIRE: TEN THOUSAND HORSE STRIKES.

dialogue.speaker: GAMDO GO
dialogue.line: HAAAH!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: TAI CHI CH'LAN STEEL DEMON'S MOUNTAIN.

dialogue.speaker: ANNOUNCER/OBSERVER
dialogue.line: WHAT JUST HAPPENED?! THIS IS AN UNEXPECTED TURN OF EVENTS! GAMDO GO, WHO EVERYONE PREDICTED WOULD BE AT A DISADVANTAGE, IS OVERPOWERING MANSEOK GANG!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: GANG HAS CRASHED AGAINST THE BLEACHERS. IF HE DOESN'T RETURN TO THE RING IN 20 SECONDS, HE'LL BE DISQUALIFIED FOR BEING OUT OF THE RING. HE'LL BE DISQUALIFIED FOR THE RING-OUT.

dialogue.speaker: MANSEOK GANG
dialogue.line: HEY, PUSH ME FROM BEHIND!

dialogue.speaker: ANNOUNCER/OBSERVER
dialogue.line: OH?! DESPITE BEING DEALT SOME BLOWS, GANG HAS STOOD BACK UP! HE DOES NOT LOOK FAZED AT ALL! WHAT INCREDIBLE STRENGTH!

dialogue.speaker: GAMDO GO
dialogue.line: GOOD.

dialogue.speaker: GAMDO GO
dialogue.line: WELL DONE. VERY GOOD.

dialogue.speaker: MANSEOK GANG
dialogue.line: THERE WE GO.

dialogue.speaker: MANSEOK GANG
dialogue.line: HMM?

dialogue.speaker: ANNOUNCER/OBSERVER
dialogue.line: AH! GAMDO GO ATTEMPTS SURPRISE FRONT KICK ATTACK!

dialogue.speaker: ANNOUNCER/OBSERVER
dialogue.line: HE'S GONE IN WITH HIS KICK! WILL MANSEOK GANG BE ABLE TO SURVIVE?!

dialogue.speaker: MANSEOK GANG
dialogue.line: HEAVY!

dialogue.speaker: MANSEOK GANG
dialogue.line: YOU WERE RIGHT. YES, YOU WERE. FIGHTING WITH BOTH MY HANDS TIED WAS UNREASONABLE.

dialogue.speaker: ANNOUNCER/OBSERVER
dialogue.line: MANSEOK GANG! HE TORE THE RIGHT SLEEVE OF HIS STRAITJACKET!

dialogue.speaker: GAMDO GO
dialogue.line: DID HE UNDO HIS SLEEVE TO DEFEND AGAINST MY KICK?

dialogue.speaker: GAMDO GO
dialogue.line: OH? THAT SKILL IS...

dialogue.speaker: GAMDO GO
dialogue.line: MORE THAN THAT, IS THERE EVEN A TECHNIQUE LIKE THAT IN TAEKWONDO? T-THAT'S BAD MANNERS.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A TYPE OF MARTIAL ARTS MADE FOR SURVIVING NOT IN SPORTS, BUT IN A BATTLEFIELD.

dialogue.speaker: MANSEOK GANG
dialogue.line: ALL RIGHT NOW. HIDE WELL. I CAN SEE YOUR HAIR! PEEKABOO!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A MARTIAL ARTS WHERE POKING EYES, STRIKING VITAL POINTS, GRABBING, BITING, ETC. ARE ALL ALLOWED IS NORTHERN STYLE ITF TAEKWONDO.

summary: The G.O.H. finals begin with an introduction of key participants. Gamdo Go expresses his gratitude to Jin before his match against Manseok Gang. During the intense fight, Manseok Gang reveals a brutal, battlefield-oriented Northern Style ITF Taekwondo, tearing off his straitjacket to unleash his full power.
